item.title: RT @_TobiasLee: Kimi K2.6 @Kimi_Moonshot is the new leading open-weights agent model, landing at #4 ...
item.description:
RT @_TobiasLee: Kimi K2.6 @Kimi_Moonshot is the new leading open-weights agent model, landing at #4 on Claw-Eval (Pass^3: 62.3%).
Key take…
--- @Kimi_Moonshot | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 0

item.title:
📢 Kimi K2.6 API is live
• Input Price (Cache Hit): $0.16 / M tokens • Input Price (Cache Miss): $0...
item.description:
📢 Kimi K2.6 API is live
• Input Price (Cache Hit): $0.16 / M tokens • Input Price (Cache Miss): $0.95 / M tokens • Output: $4.00 / M tokens
Kimi K2.6 is our latest + most intelligent model - stronger long-horizon coding, better instruction following & self-correction.
Native multimodal (text/image/video), thinking + non-thinking, 256K context. Supports tool calls, JSON / Partial mode, and web search.
Try it → https://t.co/XCrgjXAqMw
--- @Kimi_Moonshot | ❤️ 33 | 🔁 4 | 💬 2 | 👁 713
item.author: @Kimi_Moonshot
